titleStmt.title: SII 41.112: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 112. (A.R. No. 111 of 1905.) Maṉṉārkōyil, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Gōpālaśvamin temple at Maṉṉārkōil.

summary.p: Gift of land. Mentions that the Chēra king Rājarājadēvar made an additional grant of ten vēli of land as kuḍinīngā-kārāṇmai to the temple of Rājēndrachōḻa-viṇṇagar, as the amount of kāṇikkaḍan(land tax) from the dēvadāna village of Māṉābharaṇa-chaturvēdimangalam granted earlier was insufficient for the temple expenses. The land was distributed among some six persons for cultivation. The latter had to supply a quantity of 2000 kalam of paddy regularly on that land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koccaṭaiya panmarāṉa śrīcun=taracoḻa pāṇṭiya devarkku yāṇṭu patiṉ Āṟāvatu rājarājappāṇṭi nāṭṭu muṭikoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu muḷḷināṭṭu brahmade rājentracoḻa viṇṇakarapparamasvāmikaḷ tevatāṉamāṉa Innāṭṭu māṉāparaṇaccaruppetimaṅkalam kāṇikkaṭaṉāka kalmel veṭṭiṉa nellu mūvāyiratteṇṇūṟru nāṟpatiṉ kalane Iru tūṇi Eḻu nāḻiyum kaṭamai koḷḷak kaṭaṉ paṟṟāmaiyil ceramāṉār rājarājadevar Idevar koyilil vācalkkopurattu melainilai Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu Imāṉāparaṇaccarup
petimaṅkalam paḻampaṭi patiṟṟu veliyum Uḷppaṭak kuṭinīṅkāk kārāṇmaiyāka vāṭākkaṭaṉ Ittevar marakkāl Aṉavarata(ṉ)ṉāl nellu Iraṇṭāyirattunūṟṟukkalam Idevar pa cerakulacun=taraṉukku nilaṉ Iraṇṭu veliyum mātavaṉ tayāpālaṉ nilam Iraṇṭu veliyum Ilakkuvaṇaṉ Uttama pāṇṭiyaṉāṉa pūcakkarakecari mūven=taveḷāṉukku nilaṉ Iraṇṭu veliyum veḷāṉ vīracoḻaṉāṉamaṉukularāma mūven=ta veḷāṉukku nilaṉ Iraṇṭu veliyum cempoṉṉāṭavalāṉukku nilaṉ veliyum kuruntaṉkārikku nilaṉ veliyum Āka Aṟuvarkku nilam patiṟṟu ve
liyum Ivvūr Ūr nattamum Ivvūrkkuppaṭum nilam vaḷaiyiṟ cuṟṟum muṟṟum meṉokkiya maramum kīṉokkiya kiṇaṟum Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟiye Aṉupavikkappeṟuvārkaḷāka Innilamoṟṟi kumākak kumarakkaccāṇamum Aḻakerutu Uḷḷiṭṭa kuṭimai Ippeṟpaṭṭatuvum koḷḷāp piṟātāka vāṭākkaṭaṉ yāṇṭu patiṉāṟāvatu mutal Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum Iraṇṭāyirattu nūṟṟukkala nel Aṭṭuvārkaḷākavum Ipparicu Innilam viṟṟu Oṟṟivaiccum koḷḷappeṟuvārkaḷākavum Ipparicu kuṭi nīṅkāk kārāṇmaiyāka kalmēl veṭṭuviccuk kuṭukkaveṉṟu Atikārikaḷ villavaṉ mūventa veḷārkkuaruḷicceyya Atikārikaḷ paṉ
muven=taveḷār coṟpaṭi tirukkoyil nampu tiruvāṉan=tapuradāsaṉum tiruma ṉum śrīkāriyam pūccakkara kecari mūven=ta veḷāṉum kalmel veṭṭiyatu .
Digital edition of SII 41.112 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
